distributionRule: Research records may name and cite sources. No source prose, artwork, or closed expression is redistributed.

entries.name: SRO
provisionalSf2eDirection: ancestry with configurable chassis heritages
construct survivability benchmarked below full monster immunities
integrated upgrade represented by ancestry feats rather than free scaling equipment
repair and healing interaction expressed with existing SF2e traits
entries.settingConstraint: Sapience is emergent or technological; no soul-granting deity is required.

entries.name: Gray
provisionalSf2eDirection: low-Hit-Point psychic ancestry
limited telepathy as a baseline feature
phase reaction moved to a limited ancestry feat
psychic effects use innate occult spells or original actions
entries.settingConstraint: Origin and motives must be rewritten for Alcanzando las Estrellas rather than importing Paizo setting lore.

entries.name: Reptoid
provisionalSf2eDirection: Change Shape baseline with one prepared identity
heritages separate infiltration, resistance, and natural-weapon expressions
avoid conspiracy-based cultural essentialism
social deception supported by feats, not automatic moral alignment
entries.settingConstraint: Reptilian biology does not imply a secret global conspiracy; cultures and individuals receive independent motives.

entries.name: Verthani
provisionalSf2eDirection: camouflage requires uncovered skin and stillness
augmentation capacity becomes a heritage or feat with explicit slot limits
skill specialization follows standardized SF2e ancestry design
cultural paths are optional backgrounds rather than biological castes
entries.settingConstraint: Any devotional caste is a cultural office; worship does not confirm an existing deity.

entries.name: Witchwyrd
provisionalSf2eDirection: four-arm handling follows existing SF2e inactive-hand rules
force absorption becomes a reaction feat with bounded frequency
energy projection scales as an ancestry action
merchant culture is one option rather than a universal personality
entries.settingConstraint: An original four-armed interstellar lineage may be safer for distribution if the name or lore remains reserved material.

entries.name: Nuar
provisionalSf2eDirection: horn attack uses the standardized ancestry Strike pattern
navigation aptitude grants trained skill or circumstance support
speed remains within SF2e ancestry benchmarks
maze and pattern themes expand through heritages and feats
entries.settingConstraint: Personal legends and invented gods are cultural narratives, never evidence of real deities.
